subject: Properties of Expectation
topic: §47 Covariance, Variance of Sums, and Correlations
question: If $X_1, X_2, X_3, X_4$ are (pairwise) uncorrelated random variables each having mean 0 and variance 1, compute the correlations of (a) $X_1 + X_2$ and $X_2 + X_3$. (b) $X_1 + X_2$ and $X_3 + X_4$.
